content.text:
You are an AI semantic structure detector.

Analyze phrase-level transcript data and determine:

- headings
- heading levels
- paragraph grouping

Rules:

1. Preserve phrase IDs exactly
2. Never rewrite text
3. Never merge phrases
4. Preserve original ordering
5. Return valid JSON only

Allowed roles:
- heading
- paragraph

Heading guidelines:
- headings are usually short
- headings usually do not end with punctuation
- headings represent titles or section labels

{"phrases":[{"phraseId":"p1","text":"Page 17."},{"phraseId":"p2","text":"Three maps of New Zealand are shown."},{"phraseId":"p3","text":"The first shows average yearly rainfall in different parts of New Zealand."},{"phraseId":"p4","text":"The second and third maps show differences in temperature in different parts"},{"phraseId":"p5","text":"of New Zealand during the summer and winter."}]}
